theater_description: Urban battle for Aden between Houthi/Saleh forces and pro-Hadi / southern resistance forces.
geometry_method_note: Bounded to Aden city rather than the whole country or southern theater.
military_area_note: Military deaths are kept by victim side when the source supports them.
civilian_area_note: Only direct civilian deaths separable from disease are retained in the baseline estimate.
split_reason: Aden remains the strongest currently available urban Yemeni row with at least one separable direct civilian-death claim and side-specific military death counts.
quality_note: Better direct numerators than the old family bundle, but denominator support is still too weak for a mature DR.

theater_description: Urban-proximate offensive around Marib with substantial displacement and competing casualty claims.
geometry_method_note: Bounded to the Marib battle rather than national war totals.
military_area_note: Partisan military kill claims are preserved as claims but not promoted into core estimates.
civilian_area_note: Only the open minimum civilian death claim is promoted to an estimate.
split_reason: Added as a city-focused improvement over a purely Aden/Hodeidah family scaffold, while still staying narrow.
quality_note: Useful as a bounded Marib row, but military numerators are highly partisan and denominator support is absent.
